title: Highly 0ptimized
description: A modpack that will significantly improve your fps in minecraft
body:
Welcome to Highly Optimized, the Minecraft modpack will improve your preformance and make your game run super smooth. This modpack is all about preformance, the smoothness, so that every block you break, every mob you slay is as enjoyable as possible.

Performance Boosts: Our modpack is built for optimization with many key tweaks and enhancements that eliminate lag and boost frame rates, ensuring a smooth gameplay.

Are you ready to start your adventure? Get Highly Optimized now and take your Minecraft experience to the next level!

🌐 Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/B2skNWRf

Mods included:
- https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations
- https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3
- https://modrinth.com/mod/capes
- https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config
